mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.projectId AS "projectId", p.title AS "projectName" FROM project p JOIN empProject ep ON ep.projectId = p.projectId WHERE ep.empId = #{empId} AND p.status = '2' -- 진행 중 ORDER BY p.title

SELECT roomId, userAid, userBid, status, TO_CHAR(createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(lastMessageAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS lastMessageAt FROM chatroom WHERE ( (userAid = #{userAid} AND userBid = #{userBid}) OR (userAid = #{userBid} AND userBid = #{userAid}) ) AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatroom (roomId, userAid, userBid, createdAt, status) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userAid}, #{userBid}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'ACTIVE')
INSERT INTO chatroommember (memberid, roomId, empId, joinedAt) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{roomId}, #{empId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO chatmessage ( messageId, roomId, senderId, msgType, content, sentAt, isRead, status, expireAt ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{msgType}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N', 'SENT', SYSTIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '7' DAY )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cm.messageId, cm.roomId, cm.senderId, e2.name AS senderName, e2.profilePhoto AS senderAvatar, cm.msgType, cm.content, TO_CHAR(cm.sentAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS sentAt, cm.isRead, cm.status, cf.fileId, cf.originalName, cf.saveName, cf.fileSize, cf.fileExt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cm.sentAt DESC) AS rn FROM chatmessage cm JOIN employee2 e2 ON e2.empId = cm.senderId LEFT JOIN chatfile cf ON cf.messageId = cm.messageId WHERE cm.roomId = #{roomId} AND cm.status != 'DELETED' ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= #{offset} + #{size} ORDER BY sentAt ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chatmessage WHERE expireAt < SYSTIMESTAMP
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatfile ( fileId, messageId, roomId, uploaderId, originalName, saveName, fileSize, fileExt, uploadedAt, expireAt ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{uploaderId}, #{originalName}, #{saveName}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '7' DAY )
mapper.select: SELECT fileId, messageId, roomId, uploaderId, originalName, saveName, fileSize, fileExt, TO_CHAR(uploadedAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS uploadedAt, TO_CHAR(expireAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS expireAt FROM chatfile WHERE fileId = #{fileId}
SELECT fileId, saveName, roomId FROM chatfile WHERE expireAt < SYSTIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chatfile WHERE expireAt < SYSTIMESTAMP
